name: io.github.Timwal78/mcp-x402
title: mcp-x402 — The x402 Amazon for AI Agents
description: 51 pay-per-call MCP tools: market intel, SEC, XRPL payments, copy-trading. USDC/RLUSD. No keys.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Transport mode. Omit for stdio (default). Set to 'sse' for HTTP server mode.

environmentVariables.name: SML_PAYMENT_RECEIVER
environmentVariables.description: Optional USDC Base address to receive payments from agent tool calls.

environmentVariables.name: WALLET_SEED
environmentVariables.description: BIP-39 mnemonic for the server wallet. Auto-generated if not set.
